summary: Iteration 160 - Full Production UAT Complete. Tested 50+ pages, 23/25 backend API tests passed, all frontend pages rendered correctly. Story Video Studio P0 blank page bug CONFIRMED FIXED. Key findings: (1) All public pages render correctly, (2) Auth flows work, (3) Admin dashboard shows comprehensive analytics, (4) All AI tools render and accept input, (5) Gallery with categories/sort/remix working, (6) Pricing shows correct tiers ($9 Creator, $19 Pro).

minor.issue: Returns 404 Not Found - profile endpoint may be at different path

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays bottom UI - minor visual issue
Shows 100% failure rate alert - may be expected if no recent generations

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 160 completed full UAT. Story Video Studio P0 blank page bug is FIXED - form renders correctly with title, story textarea (min 50 chars), 6 animation styles, 5 age groups, 5 voice presets, generate button, and rate limit indicator (1/5 videos this hour). Admin dashboard shows 32 users, 257 generations, ₹29,900 revenue. Test user has ~4,980 credits. All 50+ pages tested and rendering correctly.
